title: Aokiji Stops the Killing
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Doflamingo, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #8. The central beat is aokiji stops the killing.
scene: The scene focuses on aokiji stops the killing, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Doflamingo, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's the exit! We're almost there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hmm? Who're they? Friends of yours?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Flying enemies are work for a sniper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Just because he's got a long nose!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: We formed an alliance, didn't we!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I've just been running away all day

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Time to get in some licks, myself

summary: Aokiji Stops the Killing. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
